ddls:
CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "office_code" INTEGER /* Code assigned to the office */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the office is located */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the office */,
  "address_line1" TEXT /* First line of the office address */,
  "address_line2" TEXT /* Second line of the office address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province where the office is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the office is located */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the office */,
  "territory" TEXT /* Territory or region of the office */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Time zone of the office */,
  "office_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the office manager */,
  "office_size" TEXT /* Size of the office (number of employees or physical size) */,
  "lease_start_date" TEXT /* Date the office lease starts */,
  "lease_end_date" TEXT /* Date the office lease ends */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the office location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the office location */,
  "additional_contacts" TEXT /* Additional contact information (JSON) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the office record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the office record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offices_office_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or job title of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the employee belongs to */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* ID of the office the employee is assigned to */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's supervisor */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the employee */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* Performance rating of the employee */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits information (JSON) */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the employee record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the employee record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department head */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the department */,
  "parent_department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent department (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the department record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the department record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_parent_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_head_id FOREIGN KEY ("head_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., equipment, meeting room) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* ID of the office the resource is located in */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource available */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the resource (e.g., available, in use, maintenance) */,
  "responsible_employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee responsible for the resource */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "maintenance_history" TEXT /* Maintenance history (JSON) */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the resource */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the resource record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the resource record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_resource_type FOREIGN KEY ("resource_type") REFERENCES resource_types ("resource_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_responsible_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("responsible_employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_types" (
  "resource_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource type */,
  "resource_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource type (e.g., equipment, meeting room) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource type */,
  "lifespan" INTEGER /* Expected lifespan of the resource type (in years) */,
  "maintenance_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of maintenance (e.g., monthly, yearly) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the resource type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the resource type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "kpi_metrics" (
  "kpi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each KPI */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* ID of the office the KPI is associated with */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the KPI (e.g., employee satisfaction, office expenses) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the KPI */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the KPI (e.g., percentage, dollars) */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the KPI data */,
  "metric_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of KPI collection (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the KPI was recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the KPI record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the KPI record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kpi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_kpi_metrics_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, employee) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* ID of the office the user is assigned to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User preferences (JSON) */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date and time of the last password change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's browser */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access action (JSON) */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the user session (in seconds) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access log record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access log record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., NA, EMEA, Japan) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region head */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the region */,
  "parent_region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent region (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the region record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the region record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_parent_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_head_id FOREIGN KEY ("head_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "office_regions" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* ID of the office */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "region_head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region head (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the mapping record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the mapping record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_office_regions_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_office_regions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_office_regions_region_head_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_head_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, manager, employee) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Detailed permissions for the role (JSON) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
